hausa.vision_audit_failed_the_file_may_be_to: Vision audit ya gaza. Fayil na iya zama babba sosai ko ba a tallafa masa ba.
hausa.audit_failed_try_different_content_or_: Audit ya gaza. Gwada wani abun ciki ko URL mai sauƙi.
hausa.audit_failed_the_content_could_not_be_: Audit ya gaza. Ba a iya nazarin abun ciki ba.
hausa.be_an_accessibility_change_agent_audit: Ka zama wakilin canji na accessibility — yi audit, koya, ka yi shawarwari
hausa.need_screen_readers_and_alt_text: Suna buƙatar screen reader da alt text
hausa.need_clear_language_and_structure: Suna buƙatar bayyananniyar harshe da tsari
hausa.audit_paste_it_see_what_breaks: Audit — manna shi, ka ga abin da ya karye
hausa.ai_runs_a_wcag_2_1_aa_pass_against_url: AI yana gudanar da WCAG 2.1 AA pass akan shigarwar URL / HTML / PDF / screenshot / social / gwamnati. Abubuwan da aka saba samu: alt text da ya ɓace (1.1.1), color contrast ƙasa da 4.5:1 (1.4.3), keyboard traps (2.1.1), filayen da ba su da label (3.3.2).
hausa.perceivable_operable_understandable_ro: Ana iya gani, Ana iya aiki, Ana iya fahimta, Mai ƙarfi (POUR). Kowane ma'auni na WCAG yana dacewa da ɗaya daga cikin waɗannan. Nakasa rashin daidaito ne tsakanin jiki da muhalli, ba taɓa kasancewar mutum ba.
hausa.knowbility_austin_tx_est_1999_runs_ope: Knowbility (Austin, TX, an kafa 1999) tana gudanar da OpenAIR — accessibility hackathon mafi daɗewa a duniya — kuma tana horar da ƙwararru ta hanyar AccessU. Sun rubuta babban yanki na littafin jagora da kowane auditor na zamani yake amfani da shi.
hausa.you_don_t_need_a_lawyer_to_file_an_ada: Ba ka buƙatar lauya don shigar da ƙarar ADA Title II / III ba. Ma'aikatar Shari'a (ada.gov), Section 508 (section508.gov), da ofisoshin babban lauyan jihohi duka suna karɓar ƙarar 'yan ƙasa — kuma gwamnati sites da ba a iya samu ba haramun ne.
hausa.past_audits_saved_here_so_you_can_trac: Ana ajiye audit ɗin da suka gabata a nan don ka iya bibiyar wadanne sites suka inganta (ko suka tabarbare) cikin lokaci. Aggregate metrics suna ba ka damar gabatar da case mai raba wa school IT ko vendor.
hausa.first_audit_5_audits_10_audits_critica: First Audit, Audit 5, Audit 10, Critical Issue Hunter, POUR Master, da sauransu. Yabo ga aikin da ba shi da kyau na kama matsaloli *kafin* su isa ga masu nakasa.
hausa.the_ai_will_analyze_the_website_s_acce: AI zai bincika accessibility na website bisa tsarinsa sananne da na kowa.
hausa.paste_any_html_code_from_a_school_proj: Manna kowane HTML code — daga school project, webpage, ko wanda coding tool ya samar. AI zai duba shi don matsalolin accessibility.
hausa.upload_a_pdf_document_to_check_its_acc: Ɗora takardar PDF don duba accessibility ɗinta
hausa.the_ai_will_check_for_tagged_structure: AI zai duba: tagged structure, tsarin karatu, alt text akan hotuna, form labels, color contrast, sanarwar harshe, da heading hierarchy.
hausa.upload_a_screenshot_of_a_website_app_o: Ɗora screenshot na website, app, ko takarda
hausa.the_ai_will_visually_analyze_the_scree: AI zai bincika screenshot a gani don: matsalolin color contrast, labels da suka ɓace, matsalolin layout, karatun rubutu, da shingen visual accessibility.
hausa.paste_the_post_text_include_hashtags_m: Manna rubutun post (haɗa da hashtags, ambato, da bayanin hoto)
hausa.paste_the_full_post_text_here_include_:
Manna cikakken rubutun post a nan...

Haɗa da:
• Dukkan abun cikin rubutu
• Hashtags
• Bayanin hoto (idan akwai)
• URLs na hanyoyin haɗi
hausa.audit_social_media_post: Yi audit na social media post
hausa.rewrite_post_accessibly: Sake rubuta post ta hanyar da za a iya samu
hausa.accessible_version: ✨ Sigar da za a iya samu
hausa.checks_alt_text_captions_camelcase_has: Yana dubawa: alt text, captions, CamelCase hashtags, wurin emoji, karatu, contrast, da rubutu cikin hotuna.
hausa.audit_government_and_school_websites_f: Yi audit na gwamnati da makaranta websites don bin ADA Title II. Ya haɗa da standard WCAG checks da bukatun Title II na musamman.
hausa.checks_wcag_2_1_aa_ada_coordinator_inf: Yana dubawa WCAG 2.1 AA + bayanin ADA Coordinator, accessibility statement, hanyar ƙara, PDF tagging, form accessibility, captions, da third-party tools.
hausa.running_wcag_2_1_aa_accessibility_audi: Ana gudanar da WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility audit...
hausa.checking_structure_images_contrast_key: Ana duba structure, hotuna, contrast, keyboard access, da ƙari
hausa.this_score_is_generated_by_an_ai_model: AI model ne ke samar da wannan score yana yin tunani akan abin da yake iya gani — ba automated WCAG test ba ne. Tabbatar da ainihin contrast ratios, keyboard order, da focus da kayan aiki kamar axe, WAVE, ko Lighthouse.
hausa.title_ii_things_to_investigate: ⚖️ Title II — abubuwan da za a bincika
hausa.alloflow_cannot_fetch_or_inspect_a_liv: AlloFlow ba zai iya ɗauka ko duba live site ba — waɗannan hasashe ne na AI daga training data, ba binciken da aka tabbatar ba. Kada ka da'awar bin ƙa'ida ko shigar da ƙara bisa su ba tare da ka duba kowanne da kanka ba.
hausa.file_complaint_about_findings: Shigar da ƙara game da abubuwan da aka samu
hausa.take_action_generate_complaint_letter: ✍️ Ɗauki mataki — samar da complaint letter
hausa.core_criteria_click_any_to_learn_more: core criteria. Danna kowanne don ƙarin koyo.
hausa.a_real_wcag_ratio_computed_in_your_bro: Ainihin WCAG ratio da aka lissafa a browser ɗinka daga relative luminance — ba hasashen AI ba. Zaɓi launin rubutu da launin background.
hausa.large_18pt_or_14pt_bold_this_is_the_ex: Babba = 18pt+ (ko 14pt+ bold). Wannan shi ne ainihin lissafin da axe / WAVE / Lighthouse suke amfani da shi.
hausa.press_tab_to_move_between_these_two_bu: Danna Tab don motsawa tsakanin waɗannan buttons biyu. Ɗaya yana nuna inda keyboard focus yake; ɗayan yana ɓoye shi — mai keyboard-only zai ɓace.
hausa.annual_hands_on_training_conference_hy: Taron horo na shekara-shekara na hands-on (hybrid). An sanya masa suna bayan Dr. John Slatin, yana koyar da ƙwarewa mai amfani a coding, usability, da inclusive design. Zama na gaba: Mayu 11–14, 2026.
hausa.an_8_week_global_online_competition_pa: Gasar online ta duniya ta makonni 8 da ke haɗa volunteer web professionals da nonprofits don gina accessible websites. Ya fara a matsayin hackathon na rana ɗaya kuma ya zama babban shirin Knowbility.
hausa.help_with_registration_room_hosting_an: Taimaka da rajista, room hosting, da support. Sami free conference access don shift na sa'o'i 4-8.
hausa.developers_designers_and_content_creat: Developers, designers, da content creators suna gina accessible websites don nonprofits.
hausa.attend_accessu_sessions_use_free_resou: Halarci AccessU sessions, yi amfani da free resources, kuma ka gina ƙwarewar accessibility ɗinka.
hausa.use_this_tool_to_audit_and_report_acce: Yi amfani da WANNAN kayan aiki don audit da bayar da rahoton accessibility barriers. Ka zama wakilin canji a cikin al'ummarka!
hausa.found_accessibility_barriers_generate_: Ka samu accessibility barriers? Samar da complaint letter na yau da kullum don neman canji. Zaɓi mai karɓa:
hausa.e_g_portland_public_schools_city_of_au: misali Portland Public Schools, Birnin Austin
hausa.describe_the_impact_who_is_affected_an: Bayyana tasirin (wanene ya shafa da yadda)
hausa.e_g_my_child_uses_a_screen_reader_and_: misali Yarona yana amfani da screen reader kuma ba zai iya kewaya enrollment forms ba...
hausa.contact_the_entity_s_ada_coordinator_f: Da farko tuntuɓi ADA Coordinator na ƙungiyar — sau da yawa suna iya warware matsaloli da sauri.
hausa.if_unresolved_file_with_the_doj_at_ada: Idan ba a warware ba, shigar da ƙara ga DOJ a ada.gov/file-a-complaint/
hausa.you_can_also_mail_u_s_doj_civil_rights: Hakanan za ka iya aikawa: U.S. DOJ, Civil Rights Division, 950 Pennsylvania Ave NW, Washington DC 20530
hausa.no_audits_yet_run_your_first_audit_to_: Babu audit tukuna. Gudanar da audit ɗinka na farko don ganin sakamako a nan.

yoruba.vision_audit_failed_the_file_may_be_to: Vision audit kùnà. Fáìlì náà lè tóbi jù tàbí kò ní àtìlẹ́yìn.
yoruba.audit_failed_try_different_content_or_: Audit kùnà. Gbìyànjú àkóónú mìíràn tàbí URL tó rọrùn.
yoruba.audit_failed_the_content_could_not_be_: Audit kùnà. A kò lè ṣàyẹ̀wò àkóónú náà.
yoruba.be_an_accessibility_change_agent_audit: Jẹ́ aṣojú ìyípadà fún accessibility — ṣe audit, kọ́, gbáníyàn
yoruba.blind_low_vision: Afọ́jú àti àwọn tó ríran kékeré
yoruba.need_screen_readers_and_alt_text: Wọ́n nílò screen reader àti alt text
yoruba.deaf_hard_of_hearing: Adití àti àwọn tó ní ìṣòro gbígbọ́
yoruba.need_clear_language_and_structure: Wọ́n nílò èdè àti ìṣètò tó ṣe kedere
yoruba.audit_paste_it_see_what_breaks: Audit — lẹ̀ ẹ́ mọ́, wo ohun tó bàjẹ́
yoruba.ai_runs_a_wcag_2_1_aa_pass_against_url: AI ń ṣe WCAG 2.1 AA pass lórí input URL / HTML / PDF / screenshot / social / ìjọba. Àwọn àbájáde tó wọ́pọ̀: alt text tó sọnù (1.1.1), color contrast tó kéré ju 4.5:1 (1.4.3), keyboard traps (2.1.1), àwọn field tí kò ní label (3.3.2).
yoruba.perceivable_operable_understandable_ro: Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust (POUR). Gbogbo àdánwò WCAG ní ìbámu pẹ̀lú ọ̀kan nínú ìwọ̀nyí. Àìlera jẹ́ àìbáramu láàrin ara àti àyíká, kì í ṣe ìwà ènìyàn rí.
yoruba.knowbility_austin_tx_est_1999_runs_ope: Knowbility (Austin, TX, dá sílẹ̀ 1999) ń ṣàkóso OpenAIR — accessibility hackathon tó pẹ́ jù lọ lágbáyé — ó sì ń kọ́ àwọn akọ́ṣẹ́mọṣẹ́ nípasẹ̀ AccessU. Wọ́n kọ ọ̀pọ̀ nínú ìwé ìtọ́nisọ́nà tí gbogbo auditor òde-òní ń lò.
yoruba.you_don_t_need_a_lawyer_to_file_an_ada: O kò nílò agbẹjọ́rò láti fi ẹ̀sùn ADA Title II / III sílẹ̀. Ẹ̀ka Ìdájọ́ (ada.gov), Section 508 (section508.gov), àti àwọn ọ́fíìsì agbẹjọ́rò àgbà ìpínlẹ̀ gbogbo ń gba ẹ̀sùn àwọn aráàlú — àwọn ojú-òpó ìjọba tí a kò lè wọlé sí sì jẹ́ àìlófin.
yoruba.past_audits_saved_here_so_you_can_trac: Àwọn audit tó kọjá ni a fi pamọ́ síbí kí o lè tọpasẹ̀ àwọn ojú-òpó wo ló dára sí (tàbí burú sí) ní àkókò. Aggregate metrics ń jẹ́ kí o lè gbé ẹjọ́ tó ṣeé pínpín kalẹ̀ fún school IT tàbí vendor.
yoruba.first_audit_5_audits_10_audits_critica: First Audit, 5 Audits, 10 Audits, Critical Issue Hunter, POUR Master, àti bẹ́ẹ̀ bẹ́ẹ̀ lọ. Ìdánilọ́lá fún iṣẹ́ tí kò lẹ́wà ti mímú àwọn ìṣòro *kí wọ́n tó* dé ọ̀dọ̀ àwọn olùmúlò abirùn.
yoruba.what_would_you_like_to_audit: Kí ni o fẹ́ ṣe audit?
yoruba.the_ai_will_analyze_the_website_s_acce: AI yóò ṣàyẹ̀wò accessibility website náà gẹ́gẹ́ bí ìṣètò rẹ̀ tí a mọ̀ àti àwọn àpẹẹrẹ tó wọ́pọ̀.
yoruba.paste_any_html_code_from_a_school_proj: Lẹ̀ HTML code èyíkéyìí mọ́ — láti school project, webpage, tàbí èyí tí coding tool ṣe. AI yóò ṣàyẹ̀wò rẹ̀ fún àwọn ìṣòro accessibility.
yoruba.upload_a_pdf_document_to_check_its_acc: Gbé àkọsílẹ̀ PDF sókè láti ṣàyẹ̀wò accessibility rẹ̀
yoruba.the_ai_will_check_for_tagged_structure: AI yóò ṣàyẹ̀wò: tagged structure, ètò kíkà, alt text lórí àwòrán, form labels, color contrast, ìkéde èdè, àti heading hierarchy.
yoruba.upload_pdf_for_accessibility_audit: Gbé PDF sókè fún accessibility audit
yoruba.upload_a_screenshot_of_a_website_app_o: Gbé screenshot ti website, app, tàbí àkọsílẹ̀ sókè
yoruba.the_ai_will_visually_analyze_the_scree: AI yóò ṣàyẹ̀wò screenshot náà lójú fún: àwọn ìṣòro color contrast, labels tó sọnù, àwọn ìṣòro layout, kíkà ọ̀rọ̀, àti àwọn ìdènà visual accessibility.
yoruba.upload_screenshot_for_accessibility_au: Gbé screenshot sókè fún accessibility audit
yoruba.paste_the_post_text_include_hashtags_m: Lẹ̀ ọ̀rọ̀ post mọ́ (fi hashtags, mentions, àti àpèjúwe àwòrán kún)
yoruba.paste_the_full_post_text_here_include_:
Lẹ̀ gbogbo ọ̀rọ̀ post mọ́ síbí...

Fi kún:
• Gbogbo àkóónú ọ̀rọ̀
• Hashtags
• Àpèjúwe àwòrán (tí ó bá wà)
• Link URLs
yoruba.rewrite_post_accessibly: Tún post kọ ní ọ̀nà tí a lè wọlé sí
yoruba.accessible_version: ✨ Ẹ̀dà tí a lè wọlé sí
yoruba.checks_alt_text_captions_camelcase_has: Ń ṣàyẹ̀wò: alt text, captions, CamelCase hashtags, ipò emoji, kíkà, contrast, àti ọ̀rọ̀ nínú àwòrán.
yoruba.audit_government_and_school_websites_f: Ṣe audit àwọn website ìjọba àti ti ilé-ìwé fún ìbámu ADA Title II. Ó ní àwọn standard WCAG checks pẹ̀lú àwọn ìbéèrè pàtó Title II.
yoruba.checks_wcag_2_1_aa_ada_coordinator_inf: Ń ṣàyẹ̀wò WCAG 2.1 AA + ìròyìn ADA Coordinator, accessibility statement, ìlànà ẹ̀dùn-ọkàn, PDF tagging, form accessibility, captions, àti third-party tools.
yoruba.running_wcag_2_1_aa_accessibility_audi: Ń ṣiṣẹ́ WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility audit...
yoruba.checking_structure_images_contrast_key: Ń ṣàyẹ̀wò structure, àwòrán, contrast, keyboard access, àti púpọ̀ sí i
yoruba.this_score_is_generated_by_an_ai_model: AI model ló ń ṣe score yìí tí ó ń ronú lórí ohun tó lè rí — kì í ṣe automated WCAG test. Ṣàyẹ̀wò àwọn contrast ratios gidi, keyboard order, àti focus pẹ̀lú àwọn irinṣẹ́ bíi axe, WAVE, tàbí Lighthouse.
yoruba.title_ii_things_to_investigate: ⚖️ Title II — àwọn nǹkan láti ṣèwádìí
yoruba.alloflow_cannot_fetch_or_inspect_a_liv: AlloFlow kò lè gba tàbí ṣàyẹ̀wò ojú-òpó alààyè — ìwọ̀nyí jẹ́ àfojúsùn AI láti training data, kì í ṣe àwọn àbájáde tí a fọwọ́sí. Má ṣe sọ ìbámu tàbí fi ẹ̀sùn sílẹ̀ lórí wọn láìsí kí o ṣàyẹ̀wò ọ̀kọ̀ọ̀kan fúnra rẹ.
yoruba.ada_coordinator_published: ADA Coordinator tí a tẹ̀ jáde
yoruba.file_complaint_about_findings: Fi ẹ̀sùn sílẹ̀ nípa àwọn àbájáde
yoruba.core_criteria_click_any_to_learn_more: core criteria. Tẹ èyíkéyìí láti kọ́ sí i.
yoruba.a_real_wcag_ratio_computed_in_your_bro: WCAG ratio GIDI tí a ṣírò nínú browser rẹ láti relative luminance — kì í ṣe àfojúsùn AI. Yan àwọ̀ ọ̀rọ̀ àti àwọ̀ background.
yoruba.large_18pt_or_14pt_bold_this_is_the_ex: Ńlá = 18pt+ (tàbí 14pt+ bold). Èyí ni gangan ìṣírò tí axe / WAVE / Lighthouse ń lò.
yoruba.press_tab_to_move_between_these_two_bu: Tẹ Tab láti rìn láàrin àwọn bọtìnnì méjì wọ̀nyí. Ọ̀kan ń fi ibi tí keyboard focus wà hàn; èkejì ń fi pamọ́ — olùmúlò keyboard-only yóò sọnù.
yoruba.annual_hands_on_training_conference_hy: Àpéjọ ìdánilẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ọwọ́-lórí ọdọọdún (hybrid). A sọ ọ́ ní orúkọ Dr. John Slatin, ó ń kọ́ àwọn ọgbọ́n tó wúlò nínú coding, usability, àti inclusive design. Ìpàdé tó kàn: May 11–14, 2026.
yoruba.an_8_week_global_online_competition_pa: Ìdíje online àgbáyé tó pẹ́ ọ̀sẹ̀ 8 tó ń so àwọn akọ́ṣẹ́mọṣẹ́ web olùyọ̀ǹda-ara-ẹni pọ̀ mọ́ àwọn nonprofits láti kọ́ àwọn website tí a lè wọlé sí. Ó bẹ̀rẹ̀ gẹ́gẹ́ bí hackathon ọjọ́ kan ó sì dàgbà di ètò pàtàkì jùlọ ti Knowbility.
yoruba.help_with_registration_room_hosting_an: Ràn lọ́wọ́ pẹ̀lú ìforúkọsílẹ̀, room hosting, àti support. Gba ìwọlé conference ọ̀fẹ́ fún shift wákàtí 4-8.
yoruba.developers_designers_and_content_creat: Developers, designers, àti content creators ń kọ́ àwọn website tí a lè wọlé sí fún nonprofits.
yoruba.attend_accessu_sessions_use_free_resou: Lọ sí àwọn AccessU sessions, lo free resources, kí o sì kọ́ àwọn ọgbọ́n accessibility rẹ.
yoruba.use_this_tool_to_audit_and_report_acce: Lo irinṣẹ́ YÌÍ láti ṣe audit àti ròyìn àwọn accessibility barriers. Jẹ́ aṣojú ìyípadà nínú àwùjọ rẹ!
yoruba.visit_knowbility_volunteer_today: ♿ Bẹ Knowbility wò — yọ̀ǹda ara rẹ lónìí
yoruba.found_accessibility_barriers_generate_: Ṣé o rí accessibility barriers? Ṣe complaint letter oníṣẹ́ọba láti béèrè ìyípadà. Yan olùgbà rẹ:
yoruba.e_g_portland_public_schools_city_of_au: f.a. Portland Public Schools, Ìlú Austin
yoruba.describe_the_impact_who_is_affected_an: Ṣàpèjúwe ipa náà (ta ló kàn àti bí ó ṣe rí)
yoruba.e_g_my_child_uses_a_screen_reader_and_: f.a. Ọmọ mi ń lo screen reader kò sì lè rìn nínú enrollment forms...
yoruba.how_to_file: 📋 Bí o ṣe lè fi sílẹ̀
yoruba.contact_the_entity_s_ada_coordinator_f: Kọ́kọ́ kàn sí ADA Coordinator ilé-iṣẹ́ náà — lọ́pọ̀ ìgbà wọ́n lè yanjú àwọn ìṣòro kíákíá.
yoruba.if_unresolved_file_with_the_doj_at_ada: Tí kò bá yanjú, fi sílẹ̀ sí DOJ ní ada.gov/file-a-complaint/
yoruba.you_can_also_mail_u_s_doj_civil_rights: O tún lè fi ránṣẹ́ sí: U.S. DOJ, Civil Rights Division, 950 Pennsylvania Ave NW, Washington DC 20530
yoruba.no_audits_yet_run_your_first_audit_to_: Kò sí audit síbẹ̀. Ṣiṣẹ́ audit àkọ́kọ́ rẹ láti rí àbájáde síbí.
